mapper.select: SELECT id, username, real_name AS realName, role, phone, email, student_id, department, avatar, created_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, real_name AS realName, role, phone, email, student_id, department, avatar, created_at FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, role, phone, email, student_id, department, avatar FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.real_name AS userName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lost_found_item i WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND i.is_deleted = 0) AS publishCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim c WHERE c.claimer_id = u.id) AS claimCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item_claim c LEFT JOIN lost_found_item i ON c.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND c.status = 'approved') AS claimedCount FROM sys_user u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, role, phone, email, student_id, department) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{studentId}, #{department})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, student_id = #{studentId}, department = #{department}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
